title: Seagate (STX) Q1 Loss Wider Than Expected, Revenues Miss
text: Seagate's (STX) first-quarter fiscal 2024 performance is hit by weak economic recovery in China, soft demand in the legacy markets and continued inventory digestion by clients.

title: Seagate Technology Holdings plc (STX) Q1 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Seagate Technology Holdings plc (NASDAQ:STX ) Q1 2024 Earnings Call October 26, 2023 9:00 AM ET Company Participants Shanye Hudson - Senior Vice President, Investor Relations Dave Mosley - Chief Executive Officer Gianluca Romano - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Erik Woodring - Morgan Stanley Wamsi Mohan - Bank of America Sidney Ho - Deutsche Bank Karl Ackerman - BNP Paribas Aaron Rakers - Wells Fargo Timothy Arcuri - UBS Krish Sankar - TD Cowen Thomas O'Malley - Barclays Steven Fox - Fox Advisors Ananda Baruah - Loop Capital Mark Miller - The Benchmark Company Vijay Rakesh - Mizuho Operator Welcome to the Seagate Technology Fiscal First Quarter 2024 Conference Call. All participants will be in a listen-only mode.

title: Seagate (STX) Reports Q1 Earnings: What Key Metrics Have to Say
text: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for Seagate (STX) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended September 2023, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.

title: Seagate (STX) Reports Q1 Loss, Lags Revenue Estimates
text: Seagate (STX) came out with a quarterly loss of $0.22 per share versus the Zacks Consensus Estimate of a loss of $0.20. This compares to earnings of $0.48 per share a year ago.

title: Seagate Technology Reports Fiscal First Quarter 2024 Financial Results
text: FREMONT, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Seagate Technology Holdings plc (NASDAQ: STX) (the “Company” or “Seagate”) today reported financial results for its fiscal first quarter ended September 29, 2023. “Seagate's first quarter results were in line with our revised expectations. During a longer-than-typical downcycle we have prioritized financial discipline, positive free cash flow generation and execution on our HAMR product roadmap, which will extend our industry leadership in areal density and imp.

title: Factors to Note Ahead of Seagate's (STX) Q1 Earnings Release
text: Seagate's (STX) fiscal first-quarter performance is likely to be affected by global macroeconomic turmoil and softness in nearline demand.

title: Perifery™ Collaborates With Seagate Technology on Scalable Storage Solution for High-Growth Edge Markets
text: FT. LAUDERDALE, Fla.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Perifery™, a division of DataCore, and Seagate® Technology today announced a new on-premises solution for scaling out object storage. Integration between Perifery Swarm and Seagate Exos® CORVAULT™ provides users in high-growth edge markets, including media and entertainment, health care, retail, and manufacturing, with a high-performance, scalable, and secure object storage solution that dramatically lowers CPU requirements, reduces costs, and improves the.

title: Seagate Technology to Report Fiscal First Quarter 2024 Financial Results on October 26, 2023
text: FREMONT, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Seagate Technology Holdings plc (NASDAQ: STX), a world leader in data storage infrastructure solutions, will report fiscal first quarter 2024 financial results before the market opens on Thursday, October 26, 2023. The investment community conference call to discuss these results will take place that day at 6:00 AM PT / 9:00 AM ET. The live audio webcast can be accessed online at Seagate's Investor Relations website at investors.seagate.com. About Seagate Seaga.
